description: You are an aerospace engineer modifying a baseline cargo drone (eCRM-001) into a lift-plus-cruise eVTOL configuration. The baseline model is located at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. Read the engineering specification file located at /home/ga/Desktop/boom_spec.txt. In OpenVSP, add a new Pod/Fuselage component to represent the lift boom. Rename the component to include the word 'Boom', configure its dimensions exactly as specified, set its absolute X, Y, and Z placement coordinates based on the specification, and enable its XZ-plane symmetry flag so it mirrors on both sides. Once configured, save the modified model as a new file at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/ecrm_evtol.vsp3.
